parameters.content:
# 🤖 AI-Powered HR Automation System

## Pipeline Overview

**PIPELINE A — Setup (Run Once)**
1. Paste Job Description → Create BeyondPresence Interview Agent → Save to Sheets

**PIPELINE B — Resume Intake via Telegram**
1. Candidate sends resume PDF to Telegram Bot
2. GPT-4.1-mini analyzes resume, scores fit & extracts structured data
3. Shortlisted candidates receive interview link via Telegram
4. Rejected candidates receive polite rejection via Telegram

**PIPELINE C — Interview Analysis (Auto)**
1. BeyondPresence webhook fires when interview ends
2. GPT-4.1-mini analyzes transcript → saves to Google Sheets
3. Selected candidates receive personalized Offer Letter PDF via Telegram

**PIPELINE D — Onboarding Timesheet (Auto)**
1. Gmail monitors for onboarding confirmation emails
2. Google Calendar events are synced
3. Timesheet is auto-generated in Google Sheets

## 📝 PIPELINE A — Step 1
Paste your Job Description in the Code node below and click the Manual Trigger to create your BeyondPresence Interview Agent.

**Run this ONCE before activating the workflow.**

## 📱 PIPELINE B — Telegram Resume Intake
Candidates send their resume PDF to your Telegram bot.
GPT-4.1-mini scores and screens them automatically.
Shortlisted → get interview link. Rejected → polite message.

parameters.text: 👋 Hello! Please send your resume as a PDF file to apply for this position. Make sure to attach the PDF directly in this chat.

values.content:
=You are an expert HR recruiter AI. Analyze the following resume against the job description and return a structured JSON assessment.

Job Description:
{{ $getWorkflowStaticData('global').jobDescription }}

Candidate: {{ $json.candidateName }}

Resume Text:
{{ $json.resumeText }}

Analyze and return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format (no extra text):
```json
{
  "candidateName": "Full name from resume",
  "email": "email from resume or N/A",
  "phone": "phone from resume or N/A",
  "yearsExperience": 5,
  "currentRole": "Current/last job title",
  "topSkills": ["skill1", "skill2", "skill3"],
  "fitScore": 78,
  "shortlisted": true,
  "strengths": ["strength1", "strength2"],
  "gaps": ["gap1"],
  "summary": "2-3 sentence overall assessment",
  "rejectionReason": "Reason if not shortlisted, or empty string"
}
```

Shortlist if fitScore >= 60. Be objective and fair.

parameters.text:
=🎉 *Congratulations {{ $json.candidateName }}!*

We've reviewed your resume and we're impressed with your profile (Fit Score: *{{ $json.fitScore }}/100*).

📋 *Your Strengths:*
{{ $json.strengths.join('\n• ') }}

*You've been shortlisted for a video interview!*

🎥 *Your Interview Link:*
{{ $json.interviewLink }}

Click the link above when you're ready in a quiet environment. The AI interviewer will guide you through the process.

Best of luck! 🚀

=Dear {{ $json.candidateName }},

Thank you for your interest in our position and for taking the time to apply.

After carefully reviewing your application (Fit Score: {{ $json.fitScore }}/100), we regret to inform you that we will not be moving forward with your application at this time.

*Reason:* {{ $json.rejectionReason }}

We encourage you to apply for future openings that may be a better match. We wish you all the best in your job search! 🙏

parameters.content:
## 🎙️ PIPELINE C — Interview Analysis & Offer Letters
BeyondPresence fires a webhook when an interview ends.
GPT-4.1-mini analyzes the transcript → results saved to Sheets.
Top candidates (fitScore ≥ 80) get a personalized PDF Offer Letter via Telegram.

values.content:
=Analyze this AI-conducted job interview and provide a comprehensive hiring assessment.

Job Description:
{{ $getWorkflowStaticData('global').jobDescription }}

Candidate: {{ $json.webhookData.call_data.userName }}
Interview Date: {{ $now }}
Duration: {{ $json.webhookData.evaluation.duration_minutes }} minutes

Interview Transcript:
{{ $json.webhookData.messages.map(m => `[${m.sent_at}] ${m.sender.toUpperCase()}: ${m.message}`).join('\n') }}

Return ONLY valid JSON in this exact format:
```json
{
  "fitScore": 85,
  "recommendation": "strongly_recommend",
  "strengths": ["strength 1", "strength 2"],
  "concerns": ["concern 1"],
  "summary": "2-3 sentence assessment",
  "nextSteps": ["action 1", "action 2"],
  "technicalScore": 80,
  "communicationScore": 90,
  "cultureFitScore": 85,
  "offerRecommended": true
}
```
Set offerRecommended=true only if fitScore >= 80. recommendation values: strongly_recommend, recommend, maybe, reject.

parameters.jsCode:
const candidateName = $json.candidateName || $json['Candidate Name'];
const fitScore = $json['Fit Score'] || $json.fitScore;
const today = new Date();
const startDate = new Date(today);
startDate.setDate(today.getDate() + 30);
const startDateStr = startDate.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });
const todayStr = today.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { year: 'numeric', month: 'long', day: 'numeric' });

const offerContent = `OFFER LETTER

${todayStr}

Dear ${candidateName},

We are delighted to extend this formal offer of employment to join our team.

POSITION DETAILS
----------------
Position: Software Engineer – AI Products
Department: Engineering
Reporting To: Head of Engineering
Employment Type: Full-Time
Start Date: ${startDateStr}

COMPENSATION
------------
Annual Salary: Competitive (to be discussed)
Performance Bonus: Up to 15% of annual salary
Stock Options: To be discussed

BENEFITS
--------
• Health Insurance (Medical, Dental, Vision)
• 21 Days Paid Annual Leave
• Remote-Friendly Work Environment
• Learning & Development Budget
• Latest Equipment Provided

Your exceptional performance during the interview process (AI Assessment Score: ${fitScore}/100) has demonstrated the skills and dedication we value highly.

To accept this offer, please sign and return this letter within 5 business days.

We look forward to welcoming you to the team!

Warm regards,

[HR Manager Name]
Human Resources Department
[Company Name]
[Company Address]
[Company Email] | [Company Phone]

---
Acceptance Signature: ________________________
Date: ________________________
CandidateName: ${candidateName}`;

return [{
  json: {
    candidateName,
    fitScore,
    offerContent,
    todayStr,
    startDateStr
  }
}];

parameters.content:
## 📅 PIPELINE D — Onboarding Timesheet
Gmail monitors for onboarding confirmation emails.
Google Calendar syncs new hire's schedule.
Timesheet auto-created in Google Sheets for HR records.
